_comment: Ground truth from Factorio 2.1.12 (Space Age enabled) via the test/oracle harness. Task 8's biome system + volcano spots (mountain_volcano_spots, vulcanus_mountains_raw_volcano, the three _full variants, the three clamped biomes), each routed onto elevation over a grid spanning spawn (fine -256..256/32 plus a coarser -800..800/160 span) and far rings at r=1500/3000, against a real Vulcanus surface (game.planets['vulcanus'].create_surface()). Regenerate: node --experimental-strip-types test/oracle/capture.ts vulcanus-biomes
